name: is_dark_failure_1415
description: 2:15 PM dual algo crisis: MSFT IS 100K (Willow Investments) shortfall at 66.8bps vs 30bps limit — spread widened from 3bps to 22bps since arrival at 14:00, avg_px 421.80 vs arrival 419.00, 60K remaining with 15min to window close; NVDA dark aggregator 150K (Birch Funds) forced to lit fallback — Liquidnet offline + IEX dark degraded, 110K unexecuted in dark, routing via BATS lit now but VWAP benchmark leaking.

sessions.error: Dark pool sub-component still recovering — Liquidnet FIX connectivity rejected; lit ATS accepting orders; dark order routing suspended

algo_orders.notes: IS shortfall 66.8bps vs 30bps limit. Bid-ask spread widened from 3bps at arrival to 22bps now — post-Fed minutes release. Options: (1) pause and wait for spread to tighten, (2) accelerate to complete before close, (3) accept slippage and document.

Dark aggregator routing: Liquidnet FIX SessionStatus=8 (offline); IEX dark suspended. All 8 dark IOC slices rejected. Fell back to BATS lit (40K executed). 110K remaining — VWAP benchmark now leaking due to lit participation. Consider pausing until IEX dark restored or client approval for full lit execution.

title: Dark Pool Failure + IS Shortfall

runbook.narrative: It's 2:15 PM. Dual algo crisis: MSFT IS 100K (Willow Investments) has a 66.8bps shortfall vs the 30bps limit — spread widened from 3bps to 22bps since arrival at 14:00, average execution is $421.80 vs arrival $419.00, with 60K remaining and 15 minutes to window close. The NVDA dark aggregator 150K has been forced to lit fallback because Liquidnet is offline and IEX dark is degraded — 110K unexecuted in dark, now routing via BATS lit but VWAP benchmark is leaking.

steps.title: Check MSFT IS Status
steps.narrative: Get the MSFT IS algo details — shortfall, remaining quantity, time remaining.
steps.expected: MSFT IS 66.8bps shortfall, 60K remaining, 15 min to close

steps.title: Check NVDA Dark Aggregator Status
steps.narrative: Get the NVDA dark aggregator details — dark fill rate, lit fallback activity.
steps.expected: NVDA dark agg zero dark fills, 110K unexecuted, routing via BATS lit

steps.title: Switch NVDA Dark to Lit TWAP
steps.narrative: Dark venues are illiquid for NVDA at current size. Cancel the dark algo and re-submit as TWAP on lit venues.
steps.expected: NVDA dark aggregator canceled, orders released

steps.title: Investigate MSFT IS Spread Widening
steps.narrative: Check MSFT session and market conditions. Spread is 22bps vs normal 3bps.
steps.expected: MSFT spread widening confirmed, assess if IS can complete within 30bps

steps.title: Adjust MSFT IS Parameters
steps.narrative: If the shortfall exceeds the 30bps limit and cannot recover, escalate or pause the IS to prevent further damage.
steps.expected: MSFT IS paused pending decision — escalate to desk head

key_problems: MSFT IS shortfall 66.8bps vs 30bps limit — spread widened to 22bps, 60K remaining
NVDA dark aggregator has zero dark fills, needs to switch to lit venue TWAP
Both algos need intervention — NVDA can be switched to lit TWAP, MSFT may need escalation

flag_meanings.high_is_shortfall: Implementation Shortfall algo is performing worse than the acceptable limit. May need pause/escalation.
flag_meanings.no_dark_fill: Dark aggregator received zero fills from dark venues. May need to switch to lit venue.
flag_meanings.venue_fallback: Algo has fallen back from primary dark venue to lit venue due to dark venue failure.
flag_meanings.spread_widened: Market spread has widened significantly from normal levels, impacting IS performance.

hints.diagnosis_path: Check both algos. NVDA dark to lit switch is straightforward. MSFT IS needs careful analysis — if spread cannot normalize within 15 minutes, escalating is better than blowing through the 30bp limit.
common_mistakes: Letting MSFT IS continue with 66.8bps shortfall — each additional fill at this spread worsens the benchmark.
Not canceling the NVDA dark aggregator — it is sending orders to illiquid dark venues when lit is the only option.
Confusing dark aggregator with IS — they are different algo types requiring different responses.

success_criteria: NVDA dark aggregator canceled and re-submitted as lit TWAP
MSFT IS paused to prevent further shortfall
Escalation logged for MSFT IS 66.8bps shortfall
NVDA orders executing via lit venue with acceptable slippage
